validator_assessment.weakest_link: Premarket exhaustion doji (05:55 bar, <5% body) occurs in thin premarket volume (5-10% of RTH liquidity) and may not predict RTH momentum — the actual bearish trigger (break of 661.19 with volume confirmation) has not fired yet as of 06:00 ET.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens at 661.50 or higher and holds 661.19 Carry support on first dip within 15 min of RTH (09:30-09:45 ET), breaking the exhaustion narrative and proving premarket doji was thin-volume noise.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks below 661.19 Carry support with volume confirmation in morning RTH

secondary.condition: if SPY holds 661.19 on first test from above and reclaims 662.10 PMH

invalidation.condition: SPY opens firm at 661.50+ and holds 661.19 Carry on first dip within 09:30-09:45 ET; OR VIX drops below 24.0 within 30 min of RTH open
invalidation.effect: Premarket BEAR exhaustion narrative collapses — RTH liquidity resets momentum; shorts covering at 661.19 trigger squeeze toward 663-664; bearish put thesis invalidated for the session.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests the 661.19 Carry support level at least once within the first 90 minutes of RTH (by 11:00 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not trade at or below 661.30 before 11:00 ET — price remains pinned in 661.60-662.10 range or rallies directly toward 663

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 24.50 through the first 60 minutes of RTH (09:30-10:30 ET), sustaining elevated put premium and confirming ongoing fear-driven selling pressure
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 24.00 by 10:30 ET, indicating post-FOMC relief repricing and invalidating the 'fear escalating' macro narrative

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY fails to close a 5-minute bar above 662.10 PMH within the first 90 minutes of RTH, consistent with the CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (144c spread) capping any early rally attempt
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY prints a 5-minute bar with a close above 662.25 before 11:00 ET, signaling PMH breakout and ribbon compression that invalidates the BEAR stack structure

synthesis_narrative: All four specialist agents (technical, macro, level_thesis, internals) unanimously agree on a bearish bias: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon with 144-cent spread, VIX at 25.87 rising +5.21% into HIGH regime, all sectors red, and a failed premarket breakout at PMH 662.10 point to downside continuation. The critical tension is that the setup is structurally bearish but the trigger has NOT fired — price at 661.59 sits $0.40 above the battle-level Carry support (661.19), and the validator rightly flags that RTH open with full liquidity resets momentum and post-FOMC stabilization on a zero-event day is a historically common whipsaw scenario. Watch the 661.19 Carry level on first RTH test: a clean break with volume confirmation opens the path to 658.58; a hold with reversal invalidates the premarket BEAR thesis for the session.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon 144c spread with failed premarket breakout (05:55 exhaustion doji) at PMH 662.10; price trapped between pivot and slow EMA

macro.one_line: VIX 25.87 HIGH regime rising +5.21%, all sectors red, zero macro events today — post-FOMC risk-off with no fresh catalysts to reverse

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 661.19 Carry support (2★) $0.40 below price; break targets 658.58 premarket low, hold targets 663.0 — BEAR ribbon + rising VIX favor the downside scenario

internals.one_line: XLK -0.97%, XLF -0.81%, XLE -0.53% all red with no bullish anchor — classic risk-off rotation with VIX escalating into HIGH regime

validator.top_invalidation: Price is $0.40 ABOVE 661.19 support — trigger not yet fired; SPY holding Carry at RTH open would break the premarket exhaustion narrative and trigger short-covering squeeze to 663
